goals.title: PRD to Goal Tree Planning
goals.description: Plan from PRD into a Goal Tree and FWUs, then schedule execution
goals.success_criteria: PRD can be parsed and converted to executable task tree with proper scheduling
goals.verification_method: Run openexec plan on sample PRD and verify JSON output structure

goals.title: Auditable Execution Loop
goals.description: Execute FWUs with an auditable loop and live status via SSE
goals.success_criteria: Tasks execute with real-time SSE events and all actions logged to audit trail
goals.verification_method: Execute tasks and verify SSE stream contains iteration/phase events

goals.title: Stack-Aware Quality Gates
goals.description: Enforce quality via stack-aware gates (Python/JS/Go/Rust) with structured results
goals.success_criteria: Quality gates run appropriate linters/tests per stack and return structured pass/fail results
goals.verification_method: Run gates on sample projects and verify structured JSON results

goals.title: HITL Approval Webhooks
goals.description: Support approvals via Telegram/WhatsApp webhooks and apply decisions to execution
goals.success_criteria: Webhook endpoints receive approval/reject/pause commands and affect execution state
goals.verification_method: Send test webhook payloads and verify execution state changes

goals.title: Unified CLI Experience
goals.description: Provide a unified CLI (init/plan/start/status/tui) for all operations
goals.success_criteria: All CLI commands work as documented with proper help and error handling
goals.verification_method: Run each CLI command with --help and verify expected behavior

goals.title: ISO-Compliant Audit Trail
goals.description: Keep an immutable audit trail with automated evidence export for ISO compliance
goals.success_criteria: Audit exports include full trail, verification evidence, model versions, and gate reports
goals.verification_method: Run openexec export --evidence and verify archive contents

goals.title: Web Dashboard Observability
goals.description: Provide a web dashboard for real-time observability of projects and execution
goals.success_criteria: Dashboard displays projects, phases, workers, and audit events via SSE
goals.verification_method: Load dashboard and verify SSE connection and data rendering

stories.title: Project Infrastructure Discovery
stories.description: As a developer, I want to understand the existing codebase structure so that I can build upon it correctly
acceptance_criteria: All existing environment variables and dependencies are documented
Existing API surface area (inputs/outputs) is mapped
Local buildability of current state is verified

tasks.title: Extract environment variables and dependencies
tasks.description: Document all env vars from existing configs and list dependencies from go.mod/package.json files
tasks.technical_strategy: Parse go.mod for Go dependencies, package.json for Node dependencies. Create ENV_VARS.md documenting all required environment variables with defaults.

tasks.title: Map existing API surface area
tasks.description: Document all existing API endpoints, their inputs, outputs, and protocols
tasks.technical_strategy: Grep for http.HandleFunc, gin routes, or mux patterns. Document in API_SURFACE.md with method, path, request/response schemas.

tasks.title: Verify local buildability
tasks.description: Ensure all existing modules build successfully in current state
tasks.technical_strategy: Run 'go build ./...' in each Go module directory. Run 'npm install && npm run build' for Node projects. Log results to BUILD_STATUS.md.

stories.title: Core Audit Schema and Writer
stories.description: As a system administrator, I want an immutable audit trail so that all execution events are logged for ISO compliance
acceptance_criteria: SQLite audit database is created with proper schema
Audit writes are non-bypassable - failures halt execution
All events include timestamp, event_type, payload, and optional signature
stories.contract: AuditWriter.Write(event AuditEvent) error - writes event or returns error that halts execution

tasks.title: Define audit schema and types
tasks.description: Create Go types for audit events and SQLite schema
tasks.technical_strategy: Define AuditEvent struct with ID, Timestamp, EventType, Payload (json.RawMessage), Signature (optional). Use 'time.Time' for timestamps. Schema: CREATE TABLE audit_events with TEXT for JSON payload.

tasks.title: Implement AuditWriter with tests
tasks.description: Create AuditWriter that writes to SQLite with non-bypassable error handling
tasks.technical_strategy: Use database/sql with sqlite3 driver. Wrap writes in transaction. On any error, return immediately - caller must halt. Include unit tests with mock DB failures.

tasks.title: Implement cryptographic signing (optional)
tasks.description: Add optional Ed25519 signing for audit events
tasks.technical_strategy: Use crypto/ed25519 for signing. Key loaded from OPENEXEC_AUDIT_KEY env var. If key present, sign; if not, leave signature empty. Never fail on missing key.

stories.title: Orchestration Plan CLI
stories.description: As a developer, I want to run 'openexec plan <intent>' so that I can generate a task tree from a PRD
acceptance_criteria: CLI accepts intent file path as argument
Outputs JSON summary to stdout
Writes tasks to .openexec/tasks.json
Supports --ordering and --timeout-mode flags
stories.contract: openexec plan <intent.md> [--ordering parallel|sequential] [--timeout-mode strict|lenient] -> JSON task tree

tasks.title: Define plan command schema and flags
tasks.description: Create cobra command with required flags and validation
tasks.technical_strategy: Use spf13/cobra for CLI. Define StringP flags for ordering (default: parallel) and timeout-mode (default: strict). Validate intent file exists before proceeding.

tasks.title: Implement intent parser
tasks.description: Parse markdown intent file into structured goals and requirements
tasks.technical_strategy: Use goldmark for markdown parsing. Extract ## headers as sections. Look for 'Goals', 'Feature:', 'Constraints' patterns. Return IntentDocument struct.

tasks.title: Implement task tree generator
tasks.description: Convert parsed intent to task tree JSON structure
tasks.technical_strategy: Map each Feature to a Story. Generate task IDs as T-US-XXX-YYY. Calculate depends_on based on sequential ordering flag. Output to .openexec/tasks.json.

tasks.title: Integrate LLM story generation
tasks.description: Use LLM to generate detailed stories from intent document
tasks.technical_strategy: Call openexec-orchestration Python service via HTTP. Pass intent markdown. Receive JSON stories. Merge with local task tree. Handle timeout with context.WithTimeout.

stories.title: Execution SSE Event Stream
stories.description: As a developer, I want real-time execution status via SSE so that I can monitor task progress
acceptance_criteria: GET /events endpoint streams SSE events
Heartbeat events sent every 30 seconds
Iteration and phase events include task ID and status
Audit write errors stop the run with explicit error event
stories.contract: GET /events -> SSE stream with event types: heartbeat, iteration, phase, error

tasks.title: Define SSE event types and schema
tasks.description: Create Go types for all SSE event payloads
tasks.technical_strategy: Define HeartbeatEvent, IterationEvent, PhaseEvent, ErrorEvent structs. Use json tags for serialization. Include timestamp in all events.

tasks.title: Implement SSE handler with heartbeat
tasks.description: Create HTTP handler that streams SSE with periodic heartbeats
tasks.technical_strategy: Set Content-Type: text/event-stream. Use time.Ticker for 30s heartbeats. Flush after each event. Handle client disconnect via request context.

tasks.title: Integrate audit writer with execution loop
tasks.description: Wire audit writes to execution events with halt-on-error
tasks.technical_strategy: Call AuditWriter.Write before each SSE emit. If Write returns error, send ErrorEvent and return immediately from handler. Never continue after audit failure.

stories.title: Stack-Aware Quality Gates
stories.description: As a developer, I want quality gates that understand my tech stack so that appropriate linters and tests run automatically
acceptance_criteria: Gates detect stack from file extensions and config files
Python: runs black, isort, flake8, mypy, pytest
JavaScript/TypeScript: runs eslint, prettier, jest/vitest
Go: runs go fmt, go vet, golangci-lint, go test
Results returned as structured JSON with pass/fail status
stories.contract: openexec gates [--stack <stack>] -> JSON {stack, gates: [{name, status, output}], overall_status}

tasks.title: Define gate result schema
tasks.description: Create types for gate configuration and results
tasks.technical_strategy: Define GateConfig struct with Name, Command, Args, FailOnError. Define GateResult with Status (pass/fail/skip), Output, Duration. Use enum for Status.

tasks.title: Implement stack detection
tasks.description: Auto-detect project stack from files and configs
tasks.technical_strategy: Check for go.mod (Go), package.json (JS/TS), pyproject.toml/setup.py (Python), Cargo.toml (Rust). Return []string of detected stacks. Handle monorepos with multiple stacks.

tasks.title: Implement Python gates
tasks.description: Create gate runners for Python tooling
tasks.technical_strategy: Check each tool exists via exec.LookPath. Run black --check, isort --check, flake8, mypy, pytest --tb=short. Capture stdout/stderr. Parse exit codes.

tasks.title: Implement JavaScript/TypeScript gates
tasks.description: Create gate runners for JS/TS tooling
tasks.technical_strategy: Detect npm vs yarn vs pnpm from lockfiles. Run eslint, prettier --check, npm test. Handle missing scripts gracefully with skip status.

tasks.title: Implement Go gates
tasks.description: Create gate runners for Go tooling
tasks.technical_strategy: Run go fmt -l (list only), go vet, golangci-lint run, go test -v ./.... Check go fmt output for any files - if any listed, fail gate.

stories.title: HITL Telegram Webhook
stories.description: As an approver, I want to approve/reject tasks via Telegram so that I can review from my phone
acceptance_criteria: POST /webhook/telegram endpoint validates secret token
Parses Telegram bot commands: /approve, /reject, /pause
Commands map to execution API state changes
Invalid tokens return 401 Unauthorized

tasks.title: Define Telegram webhook types
tasks.description: Create Go types for Telegram Update payload
tasks.technical_strategy: Define Update, Message, CallbackQuery structs matching Telegram Bot API. Use json tags. Only include fields we need: message.text, callback_query.data.

tasks.title: Implement webhook handler with auth
tasks.description: Create handler that validates secret token header
tasks.technical_strategy: Read X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token header. Compare with TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET env var using subtle.ConstantTimeCompare. Return 401 if mismatch.

tasks.title: Implement command parser and executor
tasks.description: Parse bot commands and call execution API
tasks.technical_strategy: Parse /approve <task_id>, /reject <task_id>, /pause. Use http.Client to call execution service at EXECUTION_API_URL. Log all actions to audit.

stories.title: HITL WhatsApp Webhook
stories.description: As an approver, I want to approve/reject tasks via WhatsApp so that I can use my preferred messaging app
acceptance_criteria: POST /webhook/whatsapp endpoint validates Twilio signature
Parses WhatsApp message body for commands
Commands map to execution API state changes
Invalid signatures return 403 Forbidden
stories.contract: POST /webhook/whatsapp {Twilio form data} -> 200 OK or 403 Forbidden

tasks.title: Define WhatsApp/Twilio types
tasks.description: Create Go types for Twilio webhook payload
tasks.technical_strategy: Define TwilioWebhook struct with From, Body, MessageSid fields. Parse as application/x-www-form-urlencoded. Twilio sends form data, not JSON.

tasks.title: Implement Twilio signature validation
tasks.description: Validate X-Twilio-Signature header using auth token
tasks.technical_strategy: Reconstruct signed string from URL + sorted form params. HMAC-SHA1 with TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN. Base64 encode and compare. Use twilio-go SDK if available.

tasks.title: Implement message parser and executor
tasks.description: Parse message body for commands and call execution API
tasks.technical_strategy: Parse 'approve <task_id>', 'reject <task_id>', 'pause' from Body field. Case-insensitive matching. Respond with TwiML XML for confirmation.

stories.title: OpenExec CLI Init Command
stories.description: As a developer, I want to run 'openexec init' to initialize a new project with OpenExec structure
acceptance_criteria: Creates .openexec directory with required structure
Initializes SQLite audit database
Creates default config file
Idempotent - safe to run multiple times

tasks.title: Define init command with cobra
tasks.description: Create init cobra command with --force flag
tasks.technical_strategy: Use spf13/cobra. Add --force bool flag to overwrite existing. Check for .openexec existence first. Print clear progress messages.

tasks.title: Implement directory scaffolding
tasks.description: Create .openexec directory structure
tasks.technical_strategy: Create .openexec/, .openexec/evidence/, .openexec/exports/. Use os.MkdirAll with 0755 permissions. Skip if exists and not --force.

tasks.title: Initialize audit database
tasks.description: Create SQLite database with audit schema
tasks.technical_strategy: Use database/sql with sqlite3. Run CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS for audit_events. Close connection after init. Verify with SELECT 1.

stories.title: OpenExec CLI Start Command
stories.description: As a developer, I want to run 'openexec start' to begin task execution with configurable options
acceptance_criteria: Starts execution daemon/process
Supports --harness, --provider, --model flags
Connects to SSE endpoint for status
Graceful shutdown on SIGINT/SIGTERM

tasks.title: Define start command with flags
tasks.description: Create start cobra command with execution flags
tasks.technical_strategy: Use spf13/cobra. Add StringP flags: harness (default: docker), provider (default: anthropic), model (default: claude-sonnet-4-20250514). Validate flag values.

tasks.title: Implement execution client
tasks.description: Create client to start execution via API
tasks.technical_strategy: POST to /api/execution/start with JSON body containing flags. Handle 409 Conflict if already running. Return run_id on success.

tasks.title: Implement signal handling
tasks.description: Handle SIGINT/SIGTERM for graceful shutdown
tasks.technical_strategy: Use signal.NotifyContext with os.Interrupt and syscall.SIGTERM. On signal, POST to /api/execution/stop. Wait for confirmation before exit.

stories.title: OpenExec CLI Status Command
stories.description: As a developer, I want to run 'openexec status' to see current execution state
acceptance_criteria: Connects to SSE endpoint and prints events
Shows concise, formatted status output
Handles connection errors gracefully
Exits cleanly on Ctrl+C
stories.contract: openexec status [--follow] -> prints current status or streams updates

tasks.title: Define status command with flags
tasks.description: Create status cobra command with follow flag
tasks.technical_strategy: Use spf13/cobra. Add --follow bool flag for continuous streaming. Default to one-shot status check. Add --json flag for machine-readable output.

tasks.title: Implement SSE client
tasks.description: Create client to consume SSE events from execution service
tasks.technical_strategy: Use bufio.Scanner on http.Response.Body. Parse 'event:' and 'data:' lines. Handle reconnection on EOF. Use context for cancellation.

tasks.title: Implement status formatter
tasks.description: Format status events for terminal display
tasks.technical_strategy: Use lipgloss or termenv for colors. Show task name, status, duration. Use spinner for in-progress tasks. Clear line for updates.

stories.title: OpenExec CLI TUI Dashboard
stories.description: As a developer, I want to run 'openexec tui' for a rich terminal dashboard showing execution status
acceptance_criteria: Real-time view of all workers and their status
List of pending tasks with priorities
Live log streaming panel
Keyboard navigation (j/k for up/down, q to quit)
stories.contract: openexec tui -> launches interactive terminal dashboard

tasks.title: Set up Bubbletea TUI framework
tasks.description: Initialize Bubbletea app with basic model
tasks.technical_strategy: Use charmbracelet/bubbletea. Define Model with workers, tasks, logs slices. Implement Init, Update, View methods. Handle tea.WindowSizeMsg.

tasks.title: Implement workers panel
tasks.description: Create panel showing worker status
tasks.technical_strategy: Use charmbracelet/lipgloss for styling. Show worker ID, current task, status, duration. Update via SSE events. Use table layout.

tasks.title: Implement tasks panel
tasks.description: Create panel showing pending tasks queue
tasks.technical_strategy: List tasks by priority. Show ID, title, status, depends_on. Highlight currently selected. Allow j/k navigation. Show task details on enter.

tasks.title: Implement logs panel
tasks.description: Create panel with live log streaming
tasks.technical_strategy: Use viewport component for scrollable logs. Auto-scroll to bottom on new logs. Allow scroll lock toggle. Limit to last 1000 lines.

tasks.title: Integrate SSE updates into TUI
tasks.description: Wire SSE client to update TUI model
tasks.technical_strategy: Run SSE client in goroutine. Send events via tea.Program.Send. Batch updates every 100ms to reduce renders. Handle reconnection.

stories.title: ISO-Compliant Evidence Export
stories.description: As an auditor, I want to export all project evidence so that I can review for ISO compliance
acceptance_criteria: Export includes full SQLite audit trail
Export includes all verification evidence files
Export includes model versions used
Export includes static gate reports
Output is a timestamped archive (.tar.gz)

tasks.title: Define export command with flags
tasks.description: Create export cobra command with evidence flag
tasks.technical_strategy: Use spf13/cobra. Add --evidence bool flag, --output string flag for custom path. Default output to .openexec/exports/evidence-{timestamp}.tar.gz.

tasks.title: Implement evidence collector
tasks.description: Gather all evidence files for export
tasks.technical_strategy: Copy audit.db, scan .openexec/evidence/ for verification logs, read gate reports from last run. Create manifest.json listing all included files.

tasks.title: Implement archive creator
tasks.description: Create tar.gz archive of evidence
tasks.technical_strategy: Use archive/tar and compress/gzip. Add manifest first. Include all evidence files with relative paths. Verify archive integrity after creation.

stories.title: Story-Level Validation Review
stories.description: As a reviewer, I want story-level validation checkpoints so that I review integrated features, not individual tasks
acceptance_criteria: Task verification is autonomous and evidence-based
Story validation triggers only when all tasks complete
Validation checkpoint notifies reviewer via configured channel
Validation evidence is recorded in audit trail
stories.contract: Story validation triggers POST /api/review/validate/{story_id} when all story tasks verified

tasks.title: Define validation state machine
tasks.description: Create state machine for task->story validation flow
tasks.technical_strategy: States: task_pending, task_verified, story_validating, story_validated, story_rejected. Transitions triggered by verification script results and reviewer decisions.

tasks.title: Implement task verification tracker
tasks.description: Track verification status of all tasks in a story
tasks.technical_strategy: Store task verification results in SQLite. Query for all tasks in story. Transition to story_validating when all tasks verified. Emit SSE event.

tasks.title: Implement validation notification
tasks.description: Notify reviewer when story ready for validation
tasks.technical_strategy: Send notification via configured channel (Telegram/WhatsApp/webhook). Include story summary, all task evidence links, verification script results.

stories.title: Conversational Project Wizard
stories.description: As a new user, I want an interactive wizard so that I can bootstrap a project through conversation
acceptance_criteria: Wizard asks for project name and tech stack
Generates INTENT.md from conversation
Automatically runs openexec plan after intent finalization
Presents generated tasks for approval
stories.contract: openexec wizard -> interactive session that generates INTENT.md and tasks.json

tasks.title: Define wizard command and prompts
tasks.description: Create wizard cobra command with interactive prompts
tasks.technical_strategy: Use charmbracelet/huh for form-based prompts. Ask: project name, description, tech stack (multi-select), features (text area). Validate inputs.

tasks.title: Implement intent generator
tasks.description: Generate INTENT.md from wizard answers
tasks.technical_strategy: Use text/template for markdown generation. Map tech stack to recommended patterns. Generate Goals and Features sections. Write to project root.

tasks.title: Integrate plan command into wizard flow
tasks.description: Run planning after intent generation
tasks.technical_strategy: Call plan.Execute() programmatically after writing INTENT.md. Display generated stories with confirmation prompt. Allow edit/regenerate cycle.

stories.title: Web Dashboard Core Infrastructure
stories.description: As a developer, I want a web dashboard so that I can monitor execution visually
acceptance_criteria: Next.js app scaffolded with TypeScript
Configured from .env.local for backend endpoints
SSE connection to execution service established
Basic layout with navigation
stories.verification_script: cd openexec-web && npm run build && npm run start -- -p 3000 &
stories.contract: Dashboard available at http://localhost:3000 with SSE connection to backend

tasks.title: Scaffold Next.js application
tasks.description: Create Next.js app with TypeScript and Tailwind
tasks.technical_strategy: Use create-next-app with typescript, tailwind, eslint flags. Add .env.local.example with NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL. Configure next.config.js for standalone output.

tasks.title: Implement SSE client hook
tasks.description: Create React hook for SSE connection
tasks.technical_strategy: Use EventSource API. Handle reconnection with exponential backoff. Parse event data as JSON. Expose events via useState. Cleanup on unmount.

tasks.title: Create dashboard layout
tasks.description: Build main layout with navigation
tasks.technical_strategy: Use Next.js app router layout.tsx. Add sidebar with links: Projects, Execution, Audit. Use shadcn/ui for components. Responsive design.

stories.title: Web Dashboard Execution View
stories.description: As a developer, I want to see execution progress in the dashboard so that I can monitor tasks visually
acceptance_criteria: Projects list page shows all projects
Execution page shows phases, workers, and current task
Recent audit events displayed in timeline
Real-time updates via SSE

tasks.title: Create projects list page
tasks.description: Build page showing all projects with status
tasks.technical_strategy: Fetch from /api/projects endpoint. Display as cards with name, status, last activity. Link to /execution/{id}. Add new project button.

tasks.title: Create execution detail page
tasks.description: Build page showing current execution status
tasks.technical_strategy: Use useSSE hook for real-time updates. Show phases as progress bar. Display workers in table. Current task highlighted. Logs in collapsible panel.

tasks.title: Create audit timeline component
tasks.description: Build timeline showing recent audit events
tasks.technical_strategy: Vertical timeline with event type icons. Show timestamp, event summary, link to details. Virtual scrolling for performance. Filter by event type.

tasks.title: Add E2E tests for dashboard
tasks.description: Create Playwright tests for dashboard flows
tasks.technical_strategy: Test: navigate to projects, click project, verify execution page loads, verify SSE updates displayed. Use MSW for API mocking.

stories.title: Docker Development Environment
stories.description: As a developer, I want Docker-based development so that I can run all services locally
acceptance_criteria: docker-compose.yml defines all services
All containers start successfully
Health checks pass for all services
Volume mounts enable hot-reload
stories.verification_script: docker compose up -d && docker compose ps | grep -q 'healthy'
stories.contract: docker compose up starts: cli, execution, interface, orchestration, web, postgres

tasks.title: Create Go service Dockerfiles
tasks.description: Create multi-stage Dockerfiles for Go services
tasks.technical_strategy: Use golang:1.21-alpine for build, scratch or alpine for runtime. Multi-stage: build with CGO_ENABLED=0, copy binary only. Add health check endpoint.

tasks.title: Create Python service Dockerfile
tasks.description: Create Dockerfile for orchestration service
tasks.technical_strategy: Use python:3.11-slim. Install Poetry or use pip with requirements.txt. Non-root user. Health check via /health endpoint.

tasks.title: Create docker-compose.yml
tasks.description: Define all services in compose file
tasks.technical_strategy: Services: postgres (5432), execution (8080), interface (8081), orchestration (8082), web (3000). Use healthchecks. Shared network. Volume for postgres data.

tasks.title: Validate container health checks
tasks.description: Verify all services start and pass health checks
tasks.technical_strategy: Run docker compose up -d. Wait for health checks with timeout. Verify all show 'healthy'. Log failures for debugging. Exit non-zero on any unhealthy.
tasks.verification_script: docker compose up -d && sleep 30 && docker compose ps --format json | jq -e 'all(.Health == "healthy")'

stories.title: Goal Validation E2E Tests
stories.description: As a project maintainer, I want E2E tests validating all goals so that I can verify the system works end-to-end
acceptance_criteria: Playwright tests cover all primary goals
Tests run against Docker environment
All tests pass in CI
Test results exported as evidence
stories.contract: Playwright tests in openexec-web/e2e/ validate all goals

tasks.title: Set up Playwright test infrastructure
tasks.description: Configure Playwright for E2E testing
tasks.technical_strategy: Install @playwright/test. Configure playwright.config.ts with baseURL from env. Set up webServer to start compose. Add reporters: html, json.

tasks.title: Create G-001 planning flow test
tasks.description: Test PRD to task tree generation
tasks.technical_strategy: Upload sample INTENT.md via wizard. Verify tasks.json generated. Check task count matches expected. Verify goal IDs assigned.
tasks.verification_script: cd openexec-web && npx playwright test e2e/planning.spec.ts

tasks.title: Create G-002 execution flow test
tasks.description: Test task execution with SSE monitoring
tasks.technical_strategy: Start execution via dashboard. Verify SSE events received. Check task status transitions. Verify audit events logged.
tasks.verification_script: cd openexec-web && npx playwright test e2e/execution.spec.ts

tasks.title: Create G-006 audit export test
tasks.description: Test evidence export functionality
tasks.technical_strategy: Run execution to completion. Trigger export via CLI. Verify archive created. Check archive contains audit.db, evidence files, manifest.
tasks.verification_script: cd openexec-web && npx playwright test e2e/audit-export.spec.ts

tasks.title: Export test results as evidence
tasks.description: Configure test result export for ISO compliance
tasks.technical_strategy: Copy playwright-report/ to .openexec/evidence/e2e/. Include test-results.json in evidence export. Add test run metadata (date, versions).
